backstory.original: D'hani's adventures began when she left Chult out of boredom to travel the world. She joined the Rivals as a spy for their enemy but liked them enough to stay! When not out on missions with the rest of the team, she enjoys painting the things and people she's seen on her travels.
backstory.display: 德·哈尼因为无聊而离开了楚尔特，开始环游世界。她加入深水城对手团本来是作为一名间谍，但却又因为喜欢勇士队而留了下来！没和大家一起执行任务的时候，她喜欢画旅途中看到的各种人与物。

description.original: D'hani attacks the nearest enemy and one other random enemy.
description.display: 德·哈尼会攻击最近的敌人和另外一个随机敌人。

longDescription.original: D'hani attacks the nearest enemy and one other random enemy.
longDescription.display: 德·哈尼会攻击最近的敌人和另外一个随机敌人。

description.original: The weather clears and D'hani flings sharpened paint brushes at five random enemies, dealing damage and applying paint.
description.display: 天空放晴，德·哈尼向五名随机敌人投掷尖锐的画笔，造成伤害并涂抹颜料。

longDescription.original: The weather clears and D'hani pulls a quiver of sharpened paint brushes from her robes and flings them out at five random enemies. They deal damage and apply D'hani's paints to all enemies they hit.
longDescription.display: 天空放晴，德·哈尼从她的长袍中抽出一把尖锐的画笔，向五名随机敌人扔去。它们会造成伤害，并将德·哈尼的颜料涂在所有被击中的敌人身上。

description.original: D'hani paints the enemies she attacks up to three times. She does additional damage based on the total number of paint strokes she can see
description.display: 德·哈尼最多可以给她攻击的敌人涂色 3 次。她会根据所能看到的涂色总数造成额外伤害

description.original: D'hani remembers all the enemies she has ever painted, this strengthens her attacks against future enemies.
description.display: 德·哈尼能记住所有她曾经涂色的敌人，从而强化她对未来敌人造成的攻击伤害。

description.desc: When $(source_hero) attacks she paints the enemy red. An enemy can be painted up to three times. $(source_hero)'s damage is increased by 33% for each stroke of paint she has applied to a normal enemy in the current area, and 1000% for each stroke of paint she has applied to a boss enemy in the current area, stacking multiplicatively. Normal enemy strokes cap at 100, and boss area strokes cap at 6.
每当$(source_hero)发动攻击，她会给敌人涂上红色。一个敌人最多可以被涂色 3 次。每对普通敌人施加一个笔触，$(source_hero)的伤害提高 33%；每对当前区域内的首领敌人施加一个笔触，伤害提高 1000%，以乘算方式堆叠。普通敌人笔触上限 100 笔，首领区域笔触上限 6 笔。

tipText.original: D'hani paints enemies she attacks, this causes them to take extra damage based on the number of paint strokes she can see.
tipText.display: 德·哈尼会对她攻击的敌人涂上颜色，她会根据所能看到的涂色总数造成额外伤害。

description.desc: $(source_hero) keeps track of the total number of enemies she has painted across all time. This tracking persists between resets. $(source_hero)'s damage is increased by 0.03% for each enemy she has ever painted, stacking additively.
$(source_hero)会一直记录曾经被她涂色过的敌人总数。这一记录不受重置影响。$(source_hero)每涂色一个敌人，自身的伤害增加0.03%，以加算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: D'hani remembers all the enemies she has ever painted, this strengthens her attacks against all future enemies.
tipText.display: 德·哈尼能记住所有她曾经涂色的敌人，从而强化她对未来敌人造成的攻击伤害。

description.desc: Enemies $(source_hero) paints have a $(amount)% chance to gain a splash of yellow. Enemies painted in this way drop $(dhani_gold_bonus)% more gold when they are killed.
被$(source_hero)涂色的敌人有 $(amount)% 几率被染上一抹黄色。被这样涂色的敌人在被击杀时会额外掉落 $(dhani_gold_bonus)% 的金币。

Enemies $(source_hero) paints have a $(amount)% chance to gain a stroke of green. Enemies painted in this way cause $(source_hero)'s attacks against them to damage nearby enemies as well at $(dhani_aoe_damage)% damage. This effect does not chain, but does apply paint to the enemies it damages.
被$(source_hero)涂色的敌人有 $(amount)% 几率被涂上一笔绿色。$(source_hero)攻击被涂上绿色的敌人时，附近的敌人也会受到 $(dhani_aoe_damage)% 的伤害。此效果不会连锁，但也会给同时受到伤害的敌人涂色。

Enemies $(source_hero) paints have a $(amount)% chance to gain a blotch of blue. Enemies painted in this way are stunned for $(dhani_stun_duration) seconds when $(source_hero) attacks them and boss enemies painted in this way take $(dhani_boss_damage_bonus)% more damage from all attacks.
被$(source_hero)涂色的敌人还有 $(amount)% 几率会被染上一斑蓝色。$(source_hero)攻击被涂上蓝色的敌人时会使其眩晕 $(dhani_stun_duration) 秒，被涂上蓝色的首领受到的所有伤害会提高 $(dhani_boss_damage_bonus)%。
Increase the gold find effect of Splash of Yellow by $(amount)%.
提升“黄色飞溅物”的金币寻获效果 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: D'hani adds more yellow to increase gold found.
specializationDescription.display: 德·哈尼加入更多黄色，提升找到的金币数量。

description.desc: Increase the damage done by Stroke of Green by $(amount)%
使“一道绿色”造成的伤害提升 $(amount)%

specializationDescription.original: D'hani adds more green to increase damage to nearby enemies.
specializationDescription.display: 德·哈尼加入更多绿色，提升对附近敌人的伤害。

description.desc: Increase the bonus damage done to bosses by Blotch of Blue by $(amount)%.
使“蓝色斑点”对首领造成的加成伤害提升 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: D'hani adds more blue to increase damage against bosses.
specializationDescription.display: 德·哈尼加入更多蓝色，提升对首领的伤害。

description.desc: $(source_hero)'s damage is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Rival of Waterdeep in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每存在一个“深水城的竞争对手”，$(source_hero)的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

description.original: They're focused on my hands, so they never see the feet or the wings coming.
description.display: 他们会重点关注我的手，所以他们从来都预料不到脚和翅膀的攻击。

description.original: Could we get some new paints on the way home?
description.display: 我们能在回家的路上买点新颜料吗？

description.original: This shade matches your mood, doesn't it?
description.display: 这块阴影跟你的心情很相称，不是吗？

description.original: See the red ones? Punch the red ones!
description.display: 看到红色的那些了吗？狠狠地揍他们！

description.original: The Cassalanters planted me as a spy, but that sort of backfired, didn't it?
description.display: 卡萨兰特尔人栽赃我说我是间谍，但好像他们自食其果了，不是吗？

description.original: I didn't understand what friendship was until I met the rivals.
description.display: 在遇到对手之前，我从不理解什么是友情。

description.original: If I survive this battle, I'm going to paint it.
description.display: 要是这场战斗过后我还没死，我得把它画下来。

description.original: Careful study reveals truth--in life and in art.
description.display: 谨慎研究揭露真相 - 生命和艺术莫不如是。

description.original: We need more yellow? Oh, that's fine - I've got red and green!
description.display: 我们需要更多黄色？噢，没关系，我有红色和绿色！

effects.description: Increase the chance of applying a $(upgrade_name id) by $(amount)%
Increase the gold gained from $(upgrade_name id) by $(amount)%

description.original: I think we need a bit more mossy colors.
description.display: 我觉得我们需要多一点苔色。

effects.description: Increase the chance of applying a $(upgrade_name id) by $(amount)%

description.original: Imagine a dark green. Now, darker. Darker. Keep going.
description.display: 你在脑海中想象一下暗绿色。现在想象那颜色更暗一点，再暗一点，继续加暗。

effects.description: Increase the AOE damage dealt by $(upgrade_name id) by $(amount)%
Increase the chance of applying a $(upgrade_name id) by $(amount)%
Increase the stun duration of $(upgrade_name id) by $(amount)%

description.original: It wouldn't be complete without all of us.
description.display: 没有我们大家，就不算完整。

effects.description: Increase the effect of all D'hani's Specializations by $amount%

description.original: A refreshed fighter is a strong fighter.
description.display: 清新的战士就是强大的战士。

effects.description: Increase the effect of all D'hani's Specializations by $amount%

description.original: Fighting is like mixing paint. You need to know what works for a situation.
description.display: 战斗就好像混合颜料。你需要知道应对情况要用什么。

effects.description: Increase the effect of all D'hani's Specializations by $amount%

character_sheet_details.backstory: D'hani's adventures began when she left Chult out of boredom to travel the world. She joined the Rivals as a spy for their enemy but liked them enough to stay! When not out on missions with the rest of the team, she enjoys painting the things and people she's seen on her travels.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Paints enemies increasing her damage against them and against all enemies for all time

event_upgrades.name: Way of the Brush
event_upgrades.description: D'hani remembers all the enemies she has ever painted, this strengthens her attacks against future enemies.

character_sheet_details.system_description: 涂画敌人会提高她对敌人的伤害，以及长此以往对所有敌人的伤害
